title: Backend Architecture (Django)
description: Django REST Framework backend with three main apps: 1) game_engine - Core game logic, models (Room, Player, Tile), and game state management. 2) sound_royale_api - REST API endpoints and serializers. 3) gaia - Security guards (guards_adapter.py, integrity_scanner.py) for path integrity and secret exclusion. Database: SQLite (db.sqlite3). Entry point: manage.py. Requirements: Django, DRF, channels (for future WebSocket support).

title: Component Architecture
description: Sound Royale frontend organized into: 1) /src/components - 64 reusable UI components. 2) /src/pages - 5 main routes (Index, Room, Producer, etc). 3) /src/context - GameContext and GameRefreshContext for state. 4) /src/hooks - Custom React hooks. 5) /src/types - TypeScript definitions (GameState, Player, Tile, RoomResponse). 6) /src/services - API layer. Uses React + TypeScript + Vite. Styling in index.css (5.5KB) with component-specific CSS.

title: Django Data Models
description: Three core models in backend/game_engine/models.py: 1) Room - UUID primary key, 4-char code, status (lobby/playing/finished), current_round, winner FK. 2) Player - UUID id, player_secret (for reconnection), name, avatar, room FK, is_spectator, is_connected (presence tracking). Unique constraint on (room, name). 3) Tile - UUID id, player/room FKs, genre (9 choices: phonk, trap, lofi, house, drill, rnb, edm, jazz, ambient), status (empty/pending/complete), position (0-8 for 3x3 grid), audio_file, audio_url. Unique constraint on (player, room, position).

title: Frontend API Layer
description: API communication handled by axios-based service layer (src/services/api.ts). Two main namespaces: 1) roomApi - getRooms(), getRoom(), createRoom(). 2) gameApi - joinRoom(), rejoinRoom(), startGame(), submitTile(), resetGame(), kickPlayer(). Uses transformPlayer() to convert snake_case backend responses to camelCase frontend types. Base URL configurable via VITE_API_BASE_URL env var, defaults to localhost:8000/api.

title: Private Test
description: This is a private bead test

title: Game State Management Pattern
description: Sound Royale uses React Context API for centralized game state management. GameContext (src/context/GameContext.tsx) provides: 1) GameState with players, tiles, status, and round tracking. 2) updateTileStatus() and setTileAudio() for immutable state updates. 3) GameRefreshProvider for force-refresh mechanism. 4) useWebSocketConnection() hook placeholder for real-time sync. Backend data is fetched via roomApi.getRoom() and transformed to match frontend types.

title: GAIA Security Hardening
description: Three-phase security implementation: Phase 1 (DONE) - Path integrity guards (guards_adapter.py) with SECRET_GLOBS blocking .env, *.key, *.pem, .gaia_private. Phase 2 (DONE) - CI integration (integrity_scanner.py) with GitHub Actions validation, fail-fast on violations. Phase 3 (DONE) - Namespace split: public beads in .beads/issues.jsonl (git-tracked), private beads in .gaia_private/ (git-ignored). Guards enforce DENY_SECRET_PATTERN, respect .beadsignore. See docs/sec/GAIA_SECURITY_POLICY.md and docs/GAIA_ARCHITECTURE.md.

title: GAIA Architecture Overview
description: GAIA consists of three components: Goose (AI runtime), Serena (code intelligence), and Gastown/Beads (symbolic memory). Security hardening includes path integrity guards, secret exclusion, and namespace split (public/private).
